Most undergraduate courses require GCSE English Language at grade 4/C or equivalent. Some courses also require GCSE Mathematics at grade 4/C or equivalent.
Foundation Year requirements vary by course. View the full course details or call 01782 491120 to discuss your qualifications.

Most undergraduate courses require GCSE English Language at grade 4/C or equivalent. Some courses also require GCSE Mathematics at grade 4/C or equivalent.
